data.name: Sexercise Club
data.detailed_description:
Oh baby… you didn’t come here to count reps.

Sexercise Club is a story-driven dating sim with gym management at its core. You run a private fitness club filled with hot, troubled girls. You set schedules, plan workouts, manage classes, and choose who gets personal training — and how personal it becomes.

Train bodies, build relationships, unlock dates and private sessions.

All kinds of babes come to you: shy cuties, wild nymphos, secret perverts, and dominant predators. Each one isn’t just looking for a workout. She wants to feel alive. Desired. And completely stripped — body and soul.

💦 What do you get?

  • 4 unforgettable heroines — from blushing sweetheart to fierce mature huntress

  • Provocative Gym mechanics — “train” them any way you like

  • Steamy Erotic scenes — with poses, moans, and full visual pleasure

  • The girls’ bodies and behavior transform — each touch makes them looser, and every session reshapes them The game drips with fetishes, passion, and humor — like a nightclub where anything goes

This isn’t just a visual novel. It’s your interactive sex-gym, where every choice is a caress, a command, or a step toward the next explosion of pleasure. You’re not just a trainer. You’re their fantasy. Their obsession. Their dirty little secret.

They’re ready. And you?

data.short_description: Train gorgeous girls in your own gym. Manage workouts, boost stats, schedule personal sessions, and guide each heroine through her desires and dilemmas. Turn sweat and discipline into confidence, curves, and pure sexercise!
data.supported_languages: 俄文, 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 匈牙利文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7,8,10,11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4460 / AMD FX-630
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon R7 260
  • 儲存空間: 2200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7,8,10,11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4460 / AMD FX-630
  • 記憶體: 2000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon R7 260
  • 儲存空間: 2200 MB 可用空間
